scripts.render:consultation: npx remotion render src/index.tsx MedicalConsultationVideo out/medical-consultation.mp4
scripts.render:medical: npx remotion render src/index.tsx MedicalExplainer out/medical-explainer.mp4
scripts.render:accounting: npx remotion render src/index.tsx AccountingExplainer out/accounting-explainer.mp4
scripts.render:ha-engage: npx remotion render src/index.tsx HAEngageProExplainer out/ha-engage-pro.mp4
scripts.render:all: npm run render:consultation && npm run render:medical && npm run render:accounting && npm run render:ha-engage
